creator: software@bertram-scharpf.de
text:
(In reply to Dmitry Marakasov from comment #8)
> Try running:
> 
> cd devel/xdg-utils
> make clean patch
> cd work/xdg-utils-1.1.1/scripts/desc
> xmlto -v html-nochunks xdg-desktop-menu.xml

Does this reproduce problem?

It does. Log attached.

> Also try:
> env LC_ALL=C xmlto -v html-nochunks xdg-desktop-menu.xml

The same.

> Also try reinstalling these packages:
> docbook-xml
> docbook-xsl
> sdocbook-xml
> xmlcharent
> xmlto

Makes it even worse. Several times:

  pkg-static: POST-INSTALL script failed

Full log is in the attachment.
